mustPass: Every page has a clear purpose.
Homepage contains a concrete local or business-specific value proposition.
Primary CTA is visible above the fold on the homepage.
No lorem ipsum or sample placeholder copy.
All routes from routes.json are present.
Generated code typechecks and the project builds.
avoid: Overly abstract startup language for local businesses.
Random color choices not derived from variant tokens.
Forms or features that fail at build because of missing env.
